reasoning: FSIS recalls require effectiveness checks to ensure the recalling firm has made all reasonable efforts to retrieve and destroy the product. This process is administratively slow. For a 22,000-pound retail recall, 87 days (April 5 to July 1) is a very tight window for the agency to complete its verification and formally update the webpage status from "Active" to "Closed". Other FSIS recalls from earlier in 2025 currently appear to still be active after 4 months (e.g., Bestway Sandwiches from January). Government administrative wrap-ups for consumer-level distribution typically take longer than 3 months, making early closure unlikely.
